name: zoijs-monorepo
description: Zoijs monorepo — convenience scripts to test every package from the root. Not published; not an npm workspace.

scripts.test: npm run test:deps && npm run bench:size && npm run test:core && npm run test:router && npm run test:resource && npm run test:head && npm run test:action && npm run test:storage && npm run test:forms && npm run test:testing && npm run test:devtools && npm run test:create
scripts.test:head: npm --prefix head test
scripts.test:types: npm --prefix framework run test:types && npm --prefix router run test:types && npm --prefix resource run test:types && npm --prefix head run test:types && npm --prefix action run test:types && npm --prefix storage run test:types && npm --prefix forms run test:types && npm --prefix testing run test:types && npm --prefix devtools run test:types
scripts.test:browser: npm --prefix framework run test:browser && npm --prefix router run test:browser && npm --prefix resource run test:browser && npm --prefix head run test:browser && npm --prefix action run test:browser && npm --prefix storage run test:browser && npm --prefix forms run test:browser && npm run test:task-board
scripts.install:all: npm --prefix framework install && npm --prefix router install && npm --prefix resource install && npm --prefix head install && npm --prefix action install && npm --prefix storage install && npm --prefix forms install && npm --prefix testing install && npm --prefix devtools install && npm --prefix bench install && npm --prefix examples/task-board install
